scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n music-bot,music-app,soundboard,dashboard,website -c blue,cyan,magenta,yellow,green "pnpm --filter discord-music-bot dev" "pnpm --filter discord-music-bot-app dev" "pnpm --filter discord-soundboard-bot dev" "pnpm --filter dashboard dev" "pnpm --filter bytebots-website dev"
